description: Single KPI tile for dashboards: title, headline value, optional change indicator, sparkline (composed with <chart-wc>), description, and icon. Wrap in <a href> for drill-down.

attributes.name: tone
attributes.description: Optional accent color applied to the icon slot

attributes.name: layout
attributes.description: Grid template variant: vertical stack, icon-cluster row, or dense compact

slots.name: value
slots.description: Headline number — use <data value="..."> for machine-readable values

slots.name: change
slots.description: Delta indicator — recommend nested <data> for the change value

slots.name: sparkline
slots.description: Trend visualisation — compose with <chart-wc data-type="line|area"> or any sized element

slots.name: description
slots.description: Supporting context line below the metric
